div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Spain (Bowers), Then in France
div.p:
B–25. Your 106, September 14, noon, and your 111, September 17, 3 p.m.Latter not printed; it reported that a meeting of the Diplomatic Corps would be held Friday at 6 p.m., and requested instructions (852.00/3180). You may attend this meeting as an observer. Please keep
me informed of developments. Beyond this I have no instructions at this time.

Your work has been valuable and helpful and the Embassy at Madrid is at present adequately staffed. Given the present situation at Madrid I do not believe that it would be desirable for you or any other members of the staff to return there at this time.
